text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's gathered for the final race of the
Triple Tiara, the Shuka Sho. It won't be long till
this decisive race begins, folks!

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
I've got my handkerchief and tissues ready, so I'm
all set! I'm rooting for ya, Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Please, oh, please! I hope I get to see Dober smile
that smile again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is so focused that she doesn't even
react to the sound of the roaring crowd.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Never mind. I just wanted to get you back since
you're always asking me the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Just kidding. You always ask me that, so I wanted
to tease you a bit to get you back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I answer her question frankly. As her trainer, there
hasn't been a single time I wasn't nervous while
seeing her off for a race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh... So you get nervous too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh... So you've been feeling nervous for me all
this time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I've always been so caught up with myself
that I never noticed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Too bad for you, I'm not going to give you a
chance to be nervous.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you and everyone else how much I've
grown throughout the Triple Tiara.
